title: Ankur Mishra appointed Lead - Litigation at Adani Ports
description: Ankur Mishra has been appointed to the position of Lead - Litigation at Adani Ports and SEZ.Mishra is a 2013 graduate of Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology. He earned his LLM in Business Laws from National Law School of India University in 2023.Mishra has been associated with Adani Ports for nearly 5 years. He had served as the Lead Legal for Dhamra Port, and later the Head Legal for East Coast Ports of Adani, before his elevation to the post of Lead - Litigation.In his new role, he will
